## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` is clean (zero-warning gate)
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace --exclude fluxpeer-desktop` passes
- [ ] New source files carry the right SPDX header (core = `BSD-3-Clause`, GUI clients = `AGPL-3.0-or-later`)
- [ ] No internal infra (private IPs, hostnames, credentials) added to tracked files
- [ ] Docs / CHANGELOG updated if behavior or interfaces changed
